overall.description: A cinematic Unreal Engine sequence depicting a slow, floating journey through a flooded, rain-soaked urban environment. The scene transitions from brutalist architecture to surreal geometric rock formations, rendered with heavy atmospheric fog and a sepia desaturated color grade.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban street with brutalist architecture

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting forward through the flooded street between large concrete buildings

entered.detail: large curved concrete structure with multiple window rows, dominating the right side of the frame
dark rectangular concrete building with minimal windows on the left side
water-covered street surface with raindrop ripples and building reflections
hazy tree line visible in the far distance beyond the buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a slow forward drift through a flooded urban canyon. A curved brutalist building dominates the right side while a dark blocky structure occupies the left. Rain falls steadily on the water-covered street as the camera moves toward the distant tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded plaza with geometric rock formations

events.description: urban architecture gives way to massive geometric boulders emerging from the flood water
passing alongside large angular rock formation covered in patches of moss

agents.ego_description: navigating between massive geometric rocks that rise from the flood water

entered.detail: massive angular boulder with flat faces emerging from the water in the center distance
tall thin vertical structure resembling a sign or monument on the right bank
large rock covered in green moss visible on the left side

segments.scene_description: The urban architecture recedes as the camera enters a surreal landscape of massive geometric boulders rising from the flood waters. A tall monolith stands on the right bank while moss-covered rocks begin to appear. The environment shifts from man-made to natural formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded rock canyon with moss-covered walls

events.description: entering enclosed rock canyon corridor with towering mossy walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: drifting through narrow water passages between towering moss-covered canyon walls

entered.detail: tall rock wall covered in dense green moss forming the left boundary of the canyon
thick forest of coniferous trees visible through gaps in the rock formations

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow flooded canyon enclosed by towering moss-covered rock walls. The space becomes more confined as massive boulders flank both sides, with a dense forest visible in the background. The atmosphere is intimate and enclosed compared to the open plaza before.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drift through a flooded urban canyon that gradually transforms into a surreal, enclosed landscape of geometric rock formations. It begins by gliding between a curved brutalist building and a dark blocky structure, with steady rain falling upon the water-covered street. As the urban architecture recedes, the scene opens into a surreal expanse where massive geometric boulders and a tall monolith rise from the floodwaters, shifting the environment from man-made to natural. The camera then moves deeper into the terrain, entering a narrow flooded canyon enclosed by towering moss-covered rock walls. This progression finally leads into a confined space flanked by massive boulders with a dense forest visible in the distance.
